The 193 cm cyclotron of Crocker Lab.
Up to four 3 mm thick silicon detectors cooled
to dry ice temperature were used to detect the
scattered particles.
Two monitors were used on either side of the beam.
Approximate target thickness was 4 mg/cm2 for 58Ni.
Error in normalization. Absolute
normalization of the 82 MeV data was obtained by
matching the cross sections to the optical model
calculations at angles 40 degr.
Data were recieved from Dr. A.Ingemarsson
